message:
🎨 acmm intro modal: hide misleading Esc/Space hints (#8368)

The modal sets closeOnEscape={false} and closeOnBackdrop={false} so
those hints were lying to the user — pressing Esc or Space did
nothing. Pass showKeyboardHints={false} to BaseModal.Footer to drop
them. The 'Got it — let's go' button keeps its existing right-edge
position via the inner justify-between wrapper.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -186,7 +186,7 @@ export function ACMMIntroModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ACMMIntroModalProps) { - +
